description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-data-table`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-data-table/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 33 defects — 4 P0, 14 P1, 15 P2, 0 P3

### P0 — Critical
- [ ] [P0] `aria-sort="none"` applied to non-sortable columns
- [ ] [P0] Arrow-key navigation breaks when focus is inside sort button
- [ ] [P0] No tests for filtering or pagination
- [ ] [P0] `--hx-data-table-empty-color` documented vs. implemented mismatch

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
